jobs.title: UI/UX Designer & Builder
jobs.description: We need a creative designer who also understands code. You will design clean, high-fidelity prototypes in Figma and help translate them into beautiful frontend interfaces.

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer (Flutter / React Native)
jobs.description: Build cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android. From simple client MVPs to heavy-duty consumer applications, you will handle the entire mobile lifecycle.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Node.js / Express)
jobs.description: Join our team to build scalable APIs, solid databases, and reliable background systems. You will work on real-world integrations and optimize server performances.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer (React / Next.js)
jobs.description: We are looking for a sharp Frontend Engineer who loves building fast, responsive, and gorgeous web applications. You will own client-facing features from day one.
